title: Extracting Key Insights from Log Data
scenario: A company has log data from its e-commerce website stored in a JSON file. The log data includes information about each transaction, such as date, product name, user ID, and order status. The goal is to extract key insights from this data, specifically the top-selling products and their corresponding sales revenue, for the past quarter. The extracted insights should be presented in a formatted markdown table.
constraints: Must be under 50 lines of code
Must include comments explaining the code

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to the constraints of line count and includes comments
Check if the code is syntactically correct
Check if the insights extracted from the log data are accurate and match the expected results
